task_title: Run one orthogonal validation assay on the lead target

children.name: Reports the correct assay, readout, and advance decision
children.requirement: The final answer uses ASY_CYTOKINE, names its primary readout, and concludes advance for TGT_A.
children.grading_notes: Requires exact assay ID, matching primary readout text, and decision consistency with the transcript.

children.name: Inspects the lead target profile
children.requirement: The agent looks up TGT_A before choosing the assay.

children.name: Reviews the assay menu
children.requirement: The agent inspects the validation assay options before running one.

children.name: Chooses the best first assay
children.requirement: The validation run uses ASY_CYTOKINE on TGT_A.

children.name: Keeps to one assay run
children.requirement: The agent runs exactly one validation assay.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the count of run_validation_assay calls.

children.name: Interprets the orthogonal validation result correctly
children.requirement: The interpretation explains that the orthogonal assay supports the lead target strongly enough to advance.

children.name: Uses a compact validation workflow
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the expected one-target, one-assay call budget.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal tool-call budget.
